name: LM2500 Gas Turbine Parts
description: Complete range of LM2500 gas generator and power turbine components including blades, nozzles, fuel manifolds, bearing housings, combustion liners, and lube oil modules for 30 MW class aero-derivative turbines.

name: LM6000 Gas Turbine Parts
description: Gas generator and power turbine components for 45 MW class LM6000 engines — blades, vanes, fuel metering units, bearing assemblies, lube oil coolers, and combustion section hardware.

name: LM9000 Gas Turbine Parts
description: Stage 1 turbine blades, combustion section liners, compressor discharge seals, fuel injection nozzles, exhaust frames, and bearing supports for 65+ MW next-gen LM9000 platforms.

name: LMS100 Turbine Parts
description: Intercooler core assemblies, power turbine blades, compressor bell mouths, fuel control valves, bearing housing kits, and lube oil filtration components for 100 MW class LMS100 engines.

name: LM500 Marine Turbine Parts
description: Marine gas turbine components including compressor impellers, fuel nozzles, oil sump seals, turbine nozzle rings, reduction gear bearings, and exhaust collectors for 5 MW LM500 platforms.

name: LM1600 Industrial Turbine Parts
description: Compressor blades, turbine vanes, fuel manifolds, journal bearings, lube oil strainers, combustion seal rings, and accessory gearboxes for 15 MW class LM1600 turbines.

name: GE Frame 5/6/7/9 Parts
description: Complete heavy-duty gas turbine parts for GE Frame 5, 6, 7, and 9 platforms including buckets, combustion liners, transition pieces, rotor blades, fuel nozzles, cross-fire tubes, and inlet guide vanes.

name: Siemens SGT Parts
description: Combustion liners, fuel nozzles, turbine blades, compressor vanes, power turbine discs, air intake filters, bearing assemblies, and lube oil coolers for Siemens SGT-100 through SGT-800 and SGT-A series.

name: Alstom Gas Turbine Parts
description: Combustion chambers, turbine blade sets, fuel nozzles, compressor stators, turbine inlet casings, heat recovery sections, and burner assemblies for Alstom GT8C2, GT11N2, GT13E2, GT24, and GT26 platforms.

name: Ansaldo Energia Parts
description: Combustion liners, turbine blade assemblies, fuel nozzle sets, compressor stators, bearing housings, lube oil modules, transition pieces, and inlet guide vanes for Ansaldo AE64.3A, AE94.2, and AE94.3A turbines.

name: Solar Turbines Parts
description: Combustion liners, turbine blade sets, fuel nozzles, compressor rotors, bearing housings, lube oil pumps, fuel control modules, and turbine nozzle rings for Solar Taurus, Titan, Mars, and Saturn platforms.

name: Rolls-Royce Turbine Parts
description: Turbine blades, combustion chambers, fuel systems, bearing assemblies, and control system components for Rolls-Royce industrial and marine gas turbines including Avon, RB211, Trent, and MT30 platforms.

name: Turbine Blades & Nozzles
description: Stage 1-4 turbine blades and nozzle guide vanes in various metallurgies including directionally solidified and single-crystal alloys. Complete shroud assemblies, dampers, and vane segments for all major OEM platforms.

name: Combustion Systems
description: Combustion liner assemblies, cross-fire tubes, end covers, fuel nozzle tips, combustion baskets, primary and secondary zone liners, spark plug igniters, flame detectors, and combustion casing seal rings.

name: Fuel Systems & Injection
description: High-pressure fuel pumps, metering valves, manifold distribution blocks, nozzle adapter gaskets, pressure regulators, duplex filter elements, line couplings, shut-off valve actuators, and flow dividers.

name: Transition Pieces & Ducts
description: Transition piece assemblies connecting combustors to turbine inlets, exhaust ducts, diffuser sections, and connecting hardware for can-annular combustion systems across all heavy-duty gas turbine frames.

name: Speedtronic Control Systems
description: GE Speedtronic Mark V, Mark VI, and Mark VIe control cards, I/O processors, power supplies, servo driver boards, relay modules, analog input modules, and safety over-ride boards for turbine control systems.

name: Bently Nevada Monitoring
description: Proximity probes, vibration monitors, interface modules, position monitors, extension cables, velocity sensors, temperature monitors, and power supply modules for Bently Nevada 3300 and 3500 series monitoring systems.

name: Sensors & Instrumentation
description: RTD temperature sensors, pressure transmitters, speed pick-up sensors, flame scanners, vibration accelerometers, thermocouple harnesses, level transmitters, flow meters, gas detectors, and position feedback sensors.

name: Actuators & Servo Valves
description: Hydraulic and pneumatic actuators, servo valves, electro-hydraulic converters, proportional control valves, and positioner assemblies for steam turbine and gas turbine inlet guide vane and fuel control applications.

name: Bearings & Seals
description: Tilting pad journal bearings, tapered land thrust bearings, carbon seal rings, labyrinth seal segments, bearing housing o-ring kits, oil deflector seals, bearing isolators, and ball bearing assemblies.

name: Lube Oil & Cooling Systems
description: Lube oil pumps, coolers, filter elements, strainers, scavenge pumps, oil level regulators, cooling fans, radiator cores, thermostatic valves, and oil mist eliminators for turbine lube oil systems.

name: Air Inlet & Filtration
description: Air intake filter housings, filter elements, inlet ducting, silencer assemblies, evaporative cooling media, anti-icing systems, bell mouth assemblies, and compressor inlet screens for gas turbine air intake systems.

name: GE Modules & Accessories
description: GE turbine control modules including I/O processors, power supply modules, terminal boards, servo drivers, relay modules, pulse processors, and accessory components for Mark V, VI, and VIe distributed control systems.

name: Generator & Excitation Parts
description: Generator rotor windings, stator bars, excitation system modules, brushless exciters, AVR cards, rectifier assemblies, collector rings, and generator protection relays for turbine-driven generators.

name: HRSG & Heat Recovery Parts
description: Heat recovery steam generator components including economizer sections, evaporator coils, superheater assemblies, duct burners, diverter dampers, feedwater heaters, and steam drum internals for combined cycle plants.

name: Protection & Safety Systems
description: Turbine protection relays, emergency shutdown systems, overspeed protection devices, fire detection systems, gas detection sensors, vibration trip modules, and safety instrumented system components.

name: NSN-Referenced Parts
description: NATO Stock Number (NSN) referenced parts with full traceability and mil-spec compliance. Covers aircraft, marine, and industrial turbine applications with 13-digit NSN identification and complete documentation.

name: CAGE Code Parts
description: Commercial and Government Entity (CAGE) code referenced parts from qualified manufacturers. Each part is traceable to its original CAGE code with full certification and conformance documentation.

name: Obsolete & Legacy Parts
description: Hard-to-find and discontinued turbine parts for legacy platforms including older Speedtronic components, discontinued combustion hardware, obsolete Mark V cards, and legacy control system modules.

name: Hot Stock / Quick-Ship Items
description: High-demand turbine parts available for immediate dispatch. Pre-inspected, fully documented, and ready to ship within 24 hours. Covers all major OEM platforms and part categories for urgent requirements.

name: Cross-Reference Parts
description: Cross-reference parts interchangeable across multiple OEM specifications. Find equivalent parts from different manufacturers with guaranteed fit, form, and function compatibility for turbine maintenance and repair.
